message:
feat(fnp-python): add numpy.may_share_memory passthrough wrapper (br-franken_numpy-8kna)

Expose fnp_python.may_share_memory delegating to numpy.may_share_memory(a, b, /, max_work=0).
Parity oracle test covers:
- self vs self (heuristic True)
- ravel view vs source (shared) and flatten copy vs source (independent)
- overlapping slice views of a 1-D arange
- clearly disjoint arange buffers (False)
- reversed/strided view vs source
- max_work=-1 (exact-check) surface parity
- 2-D C-contiguous axis-1 slice views
